purpose: Stylesheet for pages/code/subpages/git/styles/git-manager.css that participates in the renderer layout and visual state for the Synapse desktop interface.
gotchas: Git operations route through Electron IPC and are scoped to selected repository paths; UI components should not call git directly.
Class names are shared by multiple renderer components; broad selector changes can affect pages outside this stylesheet directory.
patterns: Page-directory organization separates high-level page shells from nested component, style, and index modules.
Plain CSS stylesheet imported by renderer modules; styling relies on shared class names rather than CSS modules.
conventions: Styles are global class selectors under src/ui/styles or subpage style directories.
